debug_info.goal:
α : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α
n : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (x : Fin (n + 1)), x ∈ support $[0..n]

proof:
intro x
    have h₁ : (x : ℕ) < n + 1 := Fin.is_lt x
    have h₂ : 0 ≤ (x : ℕ) := by
      exact Nat.zero_le _
    simp_all [Finset.mem_Ico]
    <;> omega
failed_attempts:
intro x
    have h₁ : (x : ℕ) < n + 1 := by exact x.prop
    have h₂ : (x : ℕ) ≤ n := by
      omega
    simp [List.get?]
    <;>
    rcases n with (_ | _ | n) <;>
    simp_all [List.get?, List.get?, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        induction x <;> simp_all [Fin.val_succ, List.get?]
        <;> omega
      })
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    simp [probOutput_eq_probSelect]
    <;>
    simp_all [List.get?, Fin.ext_iff]
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    aesop
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [probFailure_eq_probSelect]
    <;>
    simp_all [List.get?]
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    aesop

simp only [support_of_eq, OptionT.bind_ne_zero] at *
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.get?, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try aesop)

intro x
    have h₁ : (x : ℕ) ∈ support ( ($[0..n] : ℕ → ℝ≥0) ) := by
      have h₂ : 0 ≤ (x : ℕ) := by
        exact Nat.zero_le _
      have h₃ : (x : ℕ) ≤ n := by
        have h₄ : (x : ℕ) < n + 1 := x.is_lt
        omega
      have h₄ : ($[0..n] : ℕ → ℝ≥0) (x : ℕ) = 1 / (n + 1 : ℝ≥0) := by
        simp [range_of, uniformPMF_apply, h₂, h₃]
        <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]) <;>
        (try field_simp) <;>
        (try ring_nf) <;>
        (try norm_cast) <;>
        (try simp_all [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]) <;>
        (try omega)
      have h₅ : ($[0..n] : ℕ → ℝ≥0) (x : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
        rw [h₄]
        positivity
      simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    -- Use the fact that the coercion from Fin (n + 1) to ℕ is automatic in Lean
    simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using h₁
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    sorry
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    sorry

intro x
    simp [Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try exact ⟨x.val, by omega⟩)
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    intro x y
    simp [Finset.mem_range, Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      omega
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      omega
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      omega
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      omega
    })
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      omega
    })

intro x
    simp [support, $[0..n], Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk]
        <;> omega
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk, Finset.mem_range]
        <;> omega
      })
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    intro x y
    simp [probOutput, $[0..n], Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk]
        <;> omega
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk, Finset.mem_range]
        <;> omega
      })
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [probFailure, $[0..n], Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk]
        <;> omega
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_mk, Finset.mem_range]
        <;> omega
      })

have h₁ : x.val < n + 1 := by
      simp [Fin.is_lt]
    have h₂ : (x.val : ℕ) < Finset.card (Finset.Icc 0 n) := by
      simp_all [Finset.Icc_eq_empty, Finset.card_range]
      <;> omega
    have h₃ : (x.val : ℕ) ∈ Finset.Icc 0 n := by
      simp_all [Finset.mem_Icc]
      <;> omega
    simp_all [UniformFinite.support_eq]

simp [evalDist_eq_dist]
      <;> field_simp [Nat.cast_add_one_ne_zero]
      <;> norm_cast
      <;> simp
    exact h

intro (x : Fin (n + 1))
    have h₁ : x ∈ support ($[0..n] : ProbComp (Fin (n + 1))) := by
      have h₂ : x.val < n + 1 := x.is_lt
      have h₃ : x.val ≤ n := by linarith
      have h₄ : (x.val : ℕ) ∈ Finset.Ico 0 (n + 1) := by
        simp [Finset.mem_Ico, h₂]
        <;> omega
      -- The support of the uniform distribution over Fin (n + 1) is the entire type.
      -- Since x is a valid element of Fin (n + 1), it must be in the support.
      simp only [support_eq_iff, OptionT.support, Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_Ico]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
      (try omega)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.forall_fin_succ]
          <;> omega
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          use x.val
          <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
          <;> omega
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
    exact h₁
  
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    simp [HasUniformSelectList.uniformSelect]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ])
    <;>
    (try
      {
        cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.forall_fin_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        field_simp
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
  
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [HasUniformSelectList.uniformSelect]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ])
    <;>
    (try
      {
        cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.forall_fin_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        field_simp
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num
        <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })

omega) <;>
    (try {
      fin_cases x <;>
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_succ]
      <;>
      omega
    }) <;>
    (try {
      cases n with
      | zero =>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        omega
      | succ n =>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, Fin.val_succ]
        <;>
        omega
    })

norm_cast
        <;>
        simp_all [h₂]
        <;>
        norm_num
      -- Therefore, we can conclude that the integral of 1 over α is 1.
      simp_all [h₃]
  <;>
  simp_all [h₁]
  <;>
  linarith

intro x
    simp [support, Finset.mem_Icc, Finset.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try cases x <;> simp_all [Fin.le_iff_val_le_val, Fin.val_mk]) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        omega
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
        omega
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
        omega
      })

intro x
    simp only [Finset.mem_Icc, Fin.val_mk]
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        cases n <;> simp_all [Fin.ext_iff] <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try aesop)
      })

intro x
    simp [List.get McKin]
    <;> simp_all [List.get, Fin.val_mk]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Fin.val_mk]
    <;> aesop
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    simp [List.get McKin]
    <;> simp_all [List.get, Fin.val_mk]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Fin.val_mk]
    <;> aesop
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [List.get McKin]
    <;> simp_all [List.get, Fin.val_mk]
    <;> norm_num
    <;> simp_all [Fin.val_mk]
    <;> aesop

intro x
    simp [hasUniformSelectList, Option.getElemsupport]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try simp_all [Fin.forall_fin_succ, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try cases x <;> simp_all [Fin.forall_fin_succ, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  probOutput_selectElem_eq := by
    intro x y
    simp [hasUniformSelectList, Option.getElem_eq]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        rcases x with ⟨x, hx⟩
        rcases y with ⟨y, hy⟩
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
  probFailure_selectElem := by
    simp [hasUniformSelectList, Option.getElemsupport]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try omega)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
successful_attempts:
intro x
    have h₁ : (x : ℕ) < n + 1 := Fin.is_lt x
    have h₂ : 0 ≤ (x : ℕ) := by
      exact Nat.zero_le _
    simp_all [Finset.mem_Ico]
    <;> omega

intro x
    simp [List.range, List.mem_range]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        rcases n with (_ | _ | n) <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.mem_range, Nat.succ_eq_add_one] <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try decide)
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        rcases x with (_ | _ | x) <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.mem_range, Nat.succ_eq_add_one] <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try decide)
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
